title: prunus serrulata var. albida
intro: Prunus serrulata var. albida, also known as the Japanese white cherry or white Japanese cherry, is a deciduous tree or shrub native to Japan. The plant is rich in flavonoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Prunus serrulata var. albida include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, and can be found in some traditional Japanese and Chinese medicine remedies.
